pattern: ^\s*(?:filter truthy values|remove falsy values|clean falsy|filter empty elements of list)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\s*[\s:=>]*$
desc: Remove falsy or empty elements from a list in-place.

pattern: ^\s*(?:sort dict by key|sort dictionary keys|order dictionary by key)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\s*[\s:=>]*$
desc: Sort dictionary elements by their keys in-place.
